# Progress Log

> Updated by /progress at the end of every session.
> Read this at the start of every new session.

---
## Meta
project: [PROJECT_NAME]
repo: [GITHUB_URL]
profile: [baseline | product-ui | platform | agent-platform | monorepo-root]
last_session: YYYY-MM-DD
next_priority: [one-line description of what to do next]
blockers: [none | description]
current_phase: [phase name from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md]
---

## Session: YYYY-MM-DD (Session Title)

**Status:** [In Progress | Blocked | Complete]
**Phase:** [current IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN phase]
**What happened:**
- [1-3 bullet summary of work done]

**Completed:**
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2

**Files modified:**
- `path/to/file.ts` — [what changed]
- `path/to/file.ts` — [what changed]

**Decisions made:**
- [Architecture or design decisions with reasoning]

**Test results:**
- `npm run test:unit` — [pass/fail, coverage %]
- `npm run lint` — [pass/fail]

**Blockers:**
- [none | description + what's needed to unblock]

**Next steps:**
1. [Most important next task]
2. [Second priority]
3. [Third priority]

---
